scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @study-buddy/web" "npm run dev --workspace @study-buddy/api"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @study-buddy/shared && npm run build --workspace @study-buddy/api && npm run build --workspace @study-buddy/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @study-buddy/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @study-buddy/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @study-buddy/web
